doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The document reports implausibly large positive effects for learning-styles-matched instruction, directly contradicting the well-established scientific consensus that such matching provides no educational benefit.
